variants: primary secondary outline ghost destructive link icon-only
states: default hover active focus disabled loading
accessibility_requirements: aria-label for icon-only; role=button for non-button elements; visible focus ring
common_props: size variant disabled loading leftIcon rightIcon onClick
best_practices: Min 44px touch target; never disable without explanation; loading state replaces text

variants: text password email number search tel url
states: default focus filled error disabled readonly
accessibility_requirements: aria-label or associated label; aria-describedby for hints; aria-invalid on error
common_props: value onChange placeholder label error helperText required disabled
best_practices: Always pair with visible label; show error below not tooltip; use inputmode for mobile keyboards

accessibility_requirements: aria-expanded; aria-activedescendant; keyboard arrow navigation; role=listbox
common_props: options value onChange placeholder label multi searchable
best_practices: Searchable for 7+ options; group related items; show selected count for multi

accessibility_requirements: role=checkbox; aria-checked including mixed state; keyboard space toggle
best_practices: Use fieldset+legend for groups; indeterminate only for parent-child; label always clickable

accessibility_requirements: role=radiogroup; aria-checked; keyboard arrows cycle options; fieldset+legend
best_practices: 3-7 options max; use select for more; card variant for rich options

accessibility_requirements: same as TextInput; aria-multiline=true; character count announced
common_props: value onChange placeholder label rows maxLength autoResize
best_practices: Show character count for limited fields; auto-resize preferred over scrollbar

accessibility_requirements: role=switch; aria-checked; label describes current state not action
best_practices: Label should describe state; instant effect no save button needed; use checkbox for forms

accessibility_requirements: keyboard navigation in calendar grid; aria-label for days; announce month changes
common_props: value onChange minDate maxDate format locale
best_practices: Fallback to native input on mobile; ISO format internally; locale-aware display

variants: basic interactive hoverable media profile pricing
accessibility_requirements: role=article or region; if clickable entire card is one tab stop; heading hierarchy
common_props: title description media actions footer variant elevation
best_practices: Single primary action; image alt text required; consistent aspect ratios across grid

accessibility_requirements: role=dialog; aria-modal=true; focus trap; return focus on close; Escape to close
common_props: isOpen onClose title children size closeOnOverlay
best_practices: Trap focus inside; announce title on open; no nested modals; always provide close method

accessibility_requirements: role=status or alert; aria-live polite or assertive; auto-dismiss configurable
common_props: message type duration action onClose position
best_practices: Max 3 visible; action optional; auto-dismiss 5s default; error stays until dismissed

accessibility_requirements: role=tooltip; aria-describedby; not for essential info; Escape to close
best_practices: Touch devices use long-press or skip; never put actions inside; max 150 chars

accessibility_requirements: role=tablist; aria-selected; arrow keys switch; tab panel aria-labelledby
best_practices: Max 7 visible tabs; overflow with scroll or more menu; lazy load tab content

accessibility_requirements: nav aria-label=Breadcrumb; current page aria-current=page; ol structure
best_practices: Always show current page; max 5 visible levels; mobile collapses to parent only

accessibility_requirements: aria-label=Pagination; current aria-current=page; clear prev/next labels
best_practices: Show total count; 7 page buttons max with ellipsis; mobile uses prev/next only

accessibility_requirements: alt text for images; aria-label for icon; group announces count
best_practices: Fallback to initials then icon; consistent circular shape; status dot for online state

accessibility_requirements: aria-label announces count or status; decorative badges aria-hidden
best_practices: Max display 99+; dot for boolean state; animate only for new notifications

accessibility_requirements: role=region; aria-expanded on trigger; aria-controls links to panel; Enter/Space toggle
best_practices: Expand first item by default; icon indicates state; smooth height animation

states: default hover selected sorted loading empty
accessibility_requirements: role=table; column headers with scope; sortable columns announced; aria-sort
common_props: columns data sortable selectable pagination onRowClick
best_practices: Horizontal scroll on mobile; sticky header for long lists; empty state with CTA

accessibility_requirements: grid role with proper row/col indexes; editable cells announce mode; keyboard navigation
common_props: columns data editable filters groupBy rowHeight
best_practices: Virtual scrolling for 1000+ rows; column resize; export functionality

accessibility_requirements: role=alert for important; role=status for info; aria-live; not auto-dismiss errors
common_props: type title description dismissible action icon
best_practices: Icon reinforces meaning; never color-only differentiation; action in context

accessibility_requirements: role=progressbar; aria-valuenow aria-valuemin aria-valuemax; announce completion
best_practices: Show percentage for known progress; indeterminate for unknown; announce 25% 50% 75% 100%

accessibility_requirements: aria-busy=true on container; aria-label describes loading content
best_practices: Match target layout dimensions; pulse animation preferred; show within 300ms of load start

accessibility_requirements: nav landmark; skip-to-content link; mobile menu aria-expanded; keyboard navigable
best_practices: Skip-nav first focusable element; mobile hamburger with aria-label; max 7 primary items

accessibility_requirements: nav or complementary landmark; aria-label; toggle announces state
best_practices: Persist collapsed state; tooltip on collapsed icons; overlay on mobile; keyboard navigable

accessibility_requirements: contentinfo landmark; nav for link groups; skip to footer optional
best_practices: Semantic HTML; link groups with headings; back-to-top for long pages

accessibility_requirements: role=menu; menuitem roles; keyboard arrow navigation; typeahead search
best_practices: Max 10 visible items then scroll; dividers group related; keyboard shortcut hints

accessibility_requirements: aria-current=step; each step aria-label with number and title; announce progress
best_practices: Max 7 steps; show completed checkmark; error state blocks progression

accessibility_requirements: role=combobox; aria-expanded; aria-activedescendant; announce result count
common_props: query onChange onSubmit suggestions filters placeholder
best_practices: Debounce 300ms; show recent searches; keyboard shortcuts; highlight matching text

accessibility_requirements: aria-label on drop zone; announce upload progress; error messages per file
common_props: accept maxSize multiple onUpload onRemove preview
best_practices: Show file type restrictions; progress per file; preview images; retry on failure
